itemListElement.reviewBody: My child was studying in PKG in school of wonder kids. I have attended for a Display of my child. I was really happy of my child's study. She learnt a lot in this 2months only. In PKG she can say Hindi rhymes aslo. And the study in the school was very different with no books and home works. Really satisfied with my child's performance. Thank you to the Teachers & Management of School of wonder kids 🥰☺️

After watching the displays from Nursery to class7,I felt like as if I went to a language fare. All kids have excellent communication skills ,similar handwriting and command on GK
Very honored to attend 🙏

Title: Unveiling Excellence: The School of Wonder Kids in Gajuwaka

Nestled in the vibrant community of Gajuwaka, the School of Wonder Kids embodies a paradigm shift in education. With an innovative approach to learning, this institution has captivated the hearts and minds of students and parents alike.

At the School of Wonder Kids, education transcends traditional boundaries. Here, each child is recognized as a unique individual, and learning is personalized to suit their needs and interests. Through tailored curriculum and hands-on activities, students are empowered to explore, question, and discover the world around them.

What sets this school apart is its commitment to making learning an engaging and enriching experience. From interactive projects to outdoor experiments, every aspect of the curriculum is designed to ignite curiosity and foster a lifelong love for learning.

Moreover, the School of Wonder Kids prides itself on its holistic approach to education. Alongside academic excellence, students are encouraged to participate in extracurricular activities that nurture their talents and skills, fostering well-rounded individuals poised for success in all facets of life.

Central to the school's success are its dedicated educators, who serve as mentors and guides, inspiring students to reach their full potential. With their innovative teaching methods and unwavering support, they cultivate a culture of excellence and empowerment within the school community.

In conclusion, the School of Wonder Kids is not just a school; it is a beacon of educational innovation and excellence. For parents seeking an enriching and transformative educational experience for their children, the School of Wonder Kids in Gajuwaka stands as a testament to the power of imagination and inspiration in shaping the leaders of tomorrow.

As i want take admission for my child I asked my neighbour about their child school she brought me to the displays conducted by the school When I went to each class there are no books and no notes I was surprised but when we observed The children are  happily enjoying their lessons, reciting hundreds of poems, answering thousands of questions whatever the teacher is asking and surprisingly children are very much smart in identifying the map  they can easily say the capitals of all the countries and States and above class3 children their writing skills in all the languages Oh My God it's speechless and the  teaching methodology is completely different,activity based education what ever parents expect is indulged here.I am very much impressed with the school what the management said they have showed in live,immediately I have decided with no doubt "value based education ".

While looking for a school to join my daughter .One of my friend suggested your school.I came with her for the display you conducted in the school.After watching the students display I want to appreciate your teachers who trained them.I have never seen this in other schools. Especially  kg children
answered immediately to each and every question what ever you asked like Hindi rhymes, words pronunciation what you wrote on the board and more over they are writing uniformly.By seeing the performance of children I'm impressed and that minute I decided to join my daughter in this school.This will going to be honor to me as a parent of "School of Wonder Kids".I am going to suggest to my neighbours and my friends to join their children in this school.

School of Wonder Kids👏🏻 👌Today I came to see the display of neighbour's son who is studying in this school.  I am sending this message to congratulate you after seeing the display.
Kg kids are answering nearly 1000 of g.k questions, pointing the world map,u.k.g kids answering the question paper,class-1 children writing english, class-2 children writing hindi, class-3 children writing telugu.I felt very happy to see the similar writing.  By the third grade, they are able to read, write and speak three languages.class 4 children are doing speed mathematical calculations and class 5,6,7 children are immediately tell at what date and day we were born.
Remembering 100's of words
This made me very happy.  I am very much impressed with your concept which is different from other schools.

Thank you to the Director, Principal and all teachers for all your hardwork🙏🏻😊

Hello all I am very happy to share my feeling about wonder  kids school.Its really pleasure to me to join my daughter in this school.this school will teach the students to improve intellectual skills and to build more general knowledge and thinking ability with stress free pattern. It is one of the best school in vizag. Thank you

My daughter (Samanvi) is studying 4th Std  in school of wonderkids Gajuwaka.Recently conducted sports day on occasion of children's day.The sports was a wonderful, well coordinated event.
It was great to see all the kids perform so well with lot of confidence.we enjoyed a lot all the function . congratulations to all the teachers and entire team who organised the event.

Good caring and well teaching,
Number one school in teaching for children.the way of teaching in the school is excellent. Teachers are so friendly and care for the children
